description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a predominantly black body accented by bold red elements on the stock, grip, and fore-end. The barrel is thick and cylindrical, with visible ribbing or ringed segments along its length, suggesting reinforcement or a heat-dissipating design. The stock is solid and angular, providing a stable shoulder rest, while the grip and fore-end are ergonomically shaped for secure handling. A prominent lever is located beneath the receiver, indicating a lever-action mechanism. The trigger guard is elongated and curves smoothly around the trigger, offering ample space for gloved fingers. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer, suitable for rugged urban use.
description: A tactical black and red lever-action shotgun with a ribbed barrel, solid stock, and ergonomic grip. Features a prominent lever and an elongated trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular, ribbed barrel end and the red-tipped fore-end.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the ribbed barrel, red stock, and the visible lever beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid red and black stock and the straight alignment of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the lever, ribbed barrel, and ergonomic stock design.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, smoothly curved trigger guard with ample space and no finger grooves
